# Theorem: Artificial Boosting Crowds Out Fixed Exposure Slots

## Statement
If a feed has fixed top-K slots and an artificial boost moves item \(m\) into the top-K, some other item \(j\) must be displaced.

## Proof
Top-K contains exactly K items. Replacing or adding one item beyond K requires removing at least one item.

## Relevance
Manufactured traction has opportunity costs: authentic creators, products, or pages lose exposure.
